price: und was soll sein Besitz ihm nützen, wenn er sich ins Verderben stürzt?
arabic: وَمَا يُغۡنِي عَنۡهُ مَالُهُۥٓ إِذَا تَرَدَّىٰٓ

version.title: German Translation - Bubenheim
version.description: Translation of the Quran meanings into German by Abdullah As-Samit (Frank Bubenheim) and Dr. Nadeem Elyas

meta.transliteration: wamā yugh'nī ʿanhu māluhu idhā taraddā
